title: anaphalis rupestris
intro: Anaphalis rupestris, also known as Rock Mint or Alpine Parnassia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anaphalis rupestris include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy in many parts of the world. Anaphalis rupestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
